title: Privacy Policy
description: Our commitment to your privacy and personal data security.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: At SiCerdas, we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our services.

informationWeCollect.title: Information We Collect
informationWeCollect.content: We collect information that you provide directly to us when using our services, including name, email address, and other profile information. We may also collect technical information such as IP address, browser type, and usage data.

howWeUseInformation.title: How We Use Information
howWeUseInformation.content: We use your information to provide, maintain, and improve our services, and to communicate with you about our products and services. We may also use information to comply with legal obligations and prevent misuse.

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing
dataSharing.content: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may only share your information with trusted partners who assist us in operating our website, so long as they agree to keep this information confidential.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We implement a variety of security measures to maintain the safety of your personal information. However, no method of transmission over the Internet, or method of electronic storage, is 100% secure, so we cannot guarantee absolute security.

yourRights.title: Your Rights
yourRights.content: You have the right to access, update, or delete the personal information we hold about you. You can also object to or restrict certain processing of your information.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: We use cookies to improve user experience and analyze site traffic. You can set your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent.

changesToPolicy.title: Changes to This Policy
changesToPolicy.content: We may update our privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the "last updated" date.

contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.content: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at:
